title: Lead Investment Banker at Cholamandalam Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Cholamandalam Finance
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
